chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 320 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 22.02.2024 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate for respondents No.4 to 7. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Petitioner, a Sanitary Worker (BPS-2) in Sukkur Municipal Corporation, has filed this petition seeking directions to respondents to decide his application dated 23.05.2022 for earlier retirement. Learned Counsel for respondents No.4 to 7 undertakes that within a period of sixty days, application of the petitioner would be decided in accordance with law. Learned Counsel for petitioner is satisfied, and this petition is accordingly disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
